name: superpower-writing
description: Self-contained plugin for drafting a detailed, evidence-backed CS/systems/ML paper skeleton for a human author to refine. Ships domain skills (research lookup, citation management, literature review, TikZ figures, scientific schematics/visualization, prose polish, humanizer) and reference files (writing principles, style cautions, figures & tables). Claim-first drafting enforced by a PreToolUse hook, citation-reliability verification, and persistent .writing/ state; large parallel drafting and review run as Claude Code dynamic workflows. Ships an Academic Research Assistant output style.
